entity.label: Hazar-shual
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Village or enclosure of the jackal, a city on the south border of Judah (Josh. 15:28; Neh. 11:27). It has been identified with the ruins of Saweh, half-way between Beersheba and Moladah.

nodes.label: Hazar-shual
nodes.description: Village or enclosure of the jackal, a city on the south border of Judah (Josh. 15:28; Neh. 11:27). It has been identified with the ruins of Saweh, half-way between Beersheba and Moladah.

verses.text: And Hazarshual, and Beersheba, and Bizjothjah,
And Hazarshual, and Balah, and Azem,
And they dwelt at Beersheba, and Moladah, and Hazarshual,
And at Hazarshual, and at Beersheba, and in the villages thereof,
